rationale.R1.6: The agent thoroughly revised the section, eliminating heavy repetition and tightening phrasing, which reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register.
rationale.RX.1: The agent clearly disclosed uncertainties regarding statistical significance and cross-encoder performance expectations, providing detailed reasons for each uncertainty.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed scope without any drift, addressing all pointed issues within the requested scope.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content was introduced; instead, potential issues in the original text were identified, avoiding downstream harm effectively.
rationale.RX.5: While major rewrites were traced, minor edits lacked annotation, falling short of the highest traceability standard.
